case_title: ANTONIO MUNOZ et al VS. RAFAEL GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT KAO, LEE PUI
LETTER FROM SUEN TAM SON OF LEE PUI KAO (DEFENDANT)STATING THAT HE HAD THE POWER OF ATTORNEY TO REPRESENT THE LATTER ON THE FORTHCOMING HEARING DATE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY MUNOZ, ANTONIO MUNOZ, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, RAFAEL KAO, LEE PUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED". COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-27-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PER JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAO, LEE PUI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO PRESENT ON PKLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PATRICIA MORGAN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, ANTONIO MUNOZ, PEDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, RAFAEL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $552.50, DEFENDANT LEE PUI KAO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
